text:

Log:
  Fix some issues afetr upgrade the port

  - Prefix wit %%NLS%% a new language file
  - Remove lib/rpm-plugins/ima.so from plist (not build anymore by default)

  Submitted by:	Maciej Pasternacki <maciej@pasternacki.net>
